session_brief: Supabase → PostgreSQL + Hono API migration for DigitaliX Launchpad

context.current_stack: React 18 + Vite + Supabase Cloud (PG + Edge Functions + RLS)
context.target_stack: React 18 + Vite + Hono API (Node.js on Coolify) + PostgreSQL (Coolify)

supabase_project.note: Use the Supabase MCP to inspect and export data from the current project

coolify_setup.note: Use the Coolify MCP to provision these services

config.source: Dockerfile in api/ folder of the repo

migration_phases.name: PostgreSQL Schema
actions: Use Supabase MCP: list tables and verify schema matches docs/MIGRATION_PLAN.md
Run api/migrations/001_schema.sql on the new Coolify PostgreSQL

migration_phases.name: Hono API Backend
actions: Create api/ folder with Hono app (see MIGRATION_PLAN.md Phase 2)
7 routes replacing all Supabase RPCs and Edge Function

migration_phases.name: Frontend Migration
actions: Replace supabase client with fetch-based api client in src/lib/api.ts

migration_phases.name: Data Migration
actions: Use Supabase MCP: export data from contacts, interactions, email_logs, admin_config
Verify row counts and FK integrity

instructions_for_session: 1. Clone the repo and checkout branch claude/supabase-to-pg-plan-7Sq3Y
2. Read docs/MIGRATION_PLAN.md for the full plan
3. Use Supabase MCP to verify current schema and export data
4. Use Coolify MCP to provision PostgreSQL + Node.js app
5. Implement Phase 2 (Hono API) and Phase 3 (Frontend migration)
6. Run Phase 4 (data migration) using both MCPs
